introSection: 100% Wolf is a steel roller coaster built by German firm Gerstlauer currently under construction at Plopsaland Deutschland in Hassloch, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. The ride is expected to open in 2026.
fullText: 100% Wolf is a steel roller coaster built by German firm Gerstlauer currently under construction at Plopsaland Deutschland in Hassloch, Rhineland-Palatinate, Germany. The ride is expected to open in 2026.
